title: AI Layout Generator HTML Output (v1)
description: HTML envelope contract — the response_format the Generator's LLM emits when outputKind='html'. Replaces the JSON-zones canvas spec for the HTML rendering path. The renderer feeds `html` directly to Puppeteer's page.setContent; the image-ref shadow may use the rendered HTML bitmap as a seed for gpt-image-1.edit. Sibling contract to layout_generation.v1.json (JSON-zones path).

html.description: Complete self-contained HTML document. MUST include <html>, <head>, <body>. Inline <style> ONLY — no <link rel='stylesheet'>. NO <script>. Fixed viewport via inline width/height on <body>. All image src URLs MUST come from the supplied crop maps verbatim — no placeholders like {{...}}.

css_extracted.description: OPTIONAL — when the LLM separates CSS from HTML, the standalone CSS block. Usually empty (style stays inline in html). Renderer concatenates this with html when present.

rationale.description: 1-3 sentences explaining WHY this composition serves the Director's concept. Must reference the concept's archetype + emotional_hook + at least one signal that drove the call.

creative_style.description: Echoes back the creative_style the operator picked. Lets the Judge sanity-check no drift.

color_palette.description: The 2-5 hex colors the LLM picked for this composition. Validator uses this for contrast checks; spec preview displays it as a swatch row.

elements_used.description: Roles/components actually rendered in the HTML (e.g. 'hero_media', 'headline', 'cta', 'quote_card').

elements_skipped.description: Roles intentionally OMITTED with rationale (e.g. 'price — out of stock, suppressed'). Empty array allowed.

hierarchy_spec.description: Strategy mirror — same shape as the JSON-spec path's hierarchy_spec (strategy + layout). Lets the Judge score strategy_fit + hierarchy_consistency without parsing HTML. Required so the Pre-Judge proof-strategy filter still works.
